target.description: The product or company to build ad campaigns for (e.g., 'RouteForge field service platform')

platforms.description: Specific platforms to plan for (e.g., 'google,linkedin,meta,tiktok,reddit,youtube') or 'recommend' to let the module select based on ICP fit

budget.description: Monthly ad budget: a dollar amount (e.g., '$2000') or a tier ('minimal', 'moderate', 'aggressive'). Minimal = under $1K/mo, moderate = $1-5K/mo, aggressive = $5K+/mo

description: Platform-specific paid advertising campaign plan — platform selection based on ICP fit, campaign structures, audience targeting, ad creative direction, budget allocation, keyword strategy, and expected performance. Depends on audience-portrait upstream.
usage: advertising, ad campaign, paid ads, google ads, linkedin ads, meta ads, facebook ads, tiktok ads, paid media, ad strategy, campaign plan, paid acquisition, SEM, PPC
